title: Delegate and schedule tasks in Claude Cowork
summary: Claude Cowork is a tool that enables users to delegate work and schedule recurring tasks such as meeting prep and hourly content scans. It is presented as part of Claude's product offerings.
writeup: This video introduces Claude Cowork, a tool for delegating work and scheduling recurring tasks within Claude's product lineup. It demonstrates how the feature handles jobs such as meeting prep and hourly content scans. The core takeaway is task scheduling: routine work can run on a set cadence rather than being triggered manually each time.
